name: Larry Rowe
bio: Larry Rowe serves as the Cass County Sheriff, providing law enforcement services across Cass County from the county seat of Linden. With deep roots in East Texas, Sheriff Rowe is committed to serving and protecting the residents of Cass County.
campaignPromises: Increase border security cooperation along the Arkansas state line
Combat illegal dumping and environmental crimes in rural areas
Expand the reserve deputy program for community involvement
Upgrade patrol vehicles and equipment for deputies
Improve emergency response coordination with volunteer fire departments
